case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. MANUEL E ORELLANA CONTRERAS

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE:PLAINTIFF'S REQEUST FOR DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-16-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-17-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SOPHIA REYES LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT MANUEL ORELLANA CONTRERAS IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY JHONATTAN HERRADA, LEGAL COLLECTIONS TEAM LEAD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MANUEL E. ORELLANA CONTRERAS IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
